title: StorageManagerService.fixupAppDir 缺少调用者身份验证
notes: fixupAppDir(String path) at line 2688 has NO Binder.getCallingUid() check. Only validates path format via KNOWN_APP_DIR_PATHS regex. Any app can call fixupAppDir with another app's path (e.g. /storage/emulated/0/Android/data/com.victim.app/) to trigger mVold.fixupAppDir which changes directory uid. Can also specify other userId in path. Compare with disableAppDataIsolation (line 2717) which explicitly checks callingUid == 0 || 2000. Needs SELinux verification for mount_service access from untrusted_app.
